infringements.steward_decision_summary: 2026 BRITISH GRAND PRIX 03 - 05 July 2026 The driver and team representative are required to report to the Stewards at 13:20, in relation to the incident below: The Stewards From The Stewards To The Team Manager, Oracle Red Bull Racing Document 41 Date 04 July 2026 Time 13:01 No / Driver 6 - Isack H

raw_text_excerpt:
2026 BRITISH GRAND PRIX
03 - 05 July 2026
The driver and team representative are required to report to the Stewards at 13:20, in relation to the
incident below: 
 
The Stewards
From The Stewards
To The Team Manager,
Oracle Red Bull Racing
Document 41
Date 04 July 2026
Time 13:01
No / Driver 6 - Isack Hadjar
Reason Alleged Breach of Appendix L, Chapter IV, Article 2 b) of the FIA International
Sporting Code – Alleged abnormal change of direction by Car 30 at Turn 15 (moving
under braking).
Gerd Ennser Tanja Geilhausen
Mathieu Remmerie Pedro Lamy
Richard Norbury
